title: psidium albescens
intro: Psidium albescens, also known as the white guava, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psidium albescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Psidium albescens include infusions of the leaves, decoctions of the roots, and tinctures of the fruits, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other remedies.
